channel.title: Python on Cybernotes
channel.description: Recent content in Python on Cybernotes

item.title: Password Generator
item.description: Image by Jan Alexander from Pixabay I started to learn Python, because I noticed it is used a lot by Cyber Security professionals, and was something that I wanted to be proficient at. So, I decided to create a small program generating a random password using Python. First, let’s see the main.py file and analyze it. main.py import random import uppercase import lowercase import number import symbols import randoms print("Welcome to Password Generator") print(" --- List of available options --- ") print("Choice 1: Uppercase") print("Choice 2: Lowercase") print("Choice 3: Numbers") print("Choice 4: Symbols") print("Choice 5: Random") print("Please select one choice: ") choice = input() if (choice == "1"): uppercase.
